description_long: This armchair features a modern design with a wide, deep seat and a tall, slightly reclined backrest, both upholstered in a textured gray fabric. The armrests and legs are crafted from smoothly finished, curved wood, creating a striking contrast with the fabric and adding a touch of mid-century style. A matching rectangular cushion rests against the backrest, providing additional lumbar support and comfort. The seat and backrest are generously padded, giving the chair a plush and inviting appearance. The wooden frame is visible along the sides and base, curving elegantly from the legs up to form the armrests. The overall construction appears sturdy and well-crafted, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern armchair with textured gray upholstery, curved wooden armrests and legs, and a matching cushion for added comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, tall backrest, and central cushion, with both wooden armrests visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the continuous curve of the wooden armrest and leg, and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full height and width of the backrest, with the wooden frame visible at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the elegant wooden armrest and leg, and the plushness of the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_type: curved wooden legs integrated with armrests
